description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black and metallic brown color scheme. The stock is ergonomically shaped with a thumbhole grip, providing enhanced control and comfort for the user. The receiver and barrel assembly are streamlined, with the barrel extending in a straight line and lacking visible ribbing or venting. The trigger guard is elongated and slightly squared, offering ample space for finger placement and possibly gloved use. The overall construction appears robust, with a mix of metal and polymer materials, and the shotgun lacks any visible pump or lever mechanism. Its compact and tactical appearance suggests it is designed for urban or close-quarters use.
description: A modern, black and brown shotgun with a thumbhole stock and elongated trigger guard, built for robust urban use. The design is sleek and compact, with no visible pump or lever.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the thumbhole stock and streamlined barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view displaying the narrow barrel profile and the symmetry of the shotgun's design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the thumbhole stock and showing the metallic receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's ergonomic shape and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, straight and extended barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, slightly squared trigger guard with ample finger space
